title: Yann LeCun — Directory
excerpts:
Section Title: Executive Chairman
Content:
[AMI Labs](../)
Yann LeCun is a Turing Award laureate, NYU Professor, and one of the founding pioneers of modern deep learning. He introduced convolutional neural networks and contributed to the foundations of many of today’s core AI methods. While serving as Meta’s Chief AI Scientist, he led long-term research in self-supervised learning, autonomous intelligence, and next-generation AI architectures.

title: Yann LeCun - AMI - Advanced Machine Intelligence | LinkedIn
excerpts:
Section Title: Yann LeCun > Projects
Content:
At some point in the late 90's these systems read an estimated 10 to 20% of all the checks in the US.It used a convolutional neural net, combined with a so-called graph-transformer network, a form of non conditional random field in which the solution space can be represented by a treillis.Other creators[See project](http://yann.lecun.com/exdb/publis/pdf/lecun-01a.pdf?trk=public_profile_project-button "Check Recognition with Deep Learning")

Yann LeCun is Director of AI Research at Facebook, and Silver Professor of Data Science, Computer Science, Neural Science, and Electrical Engineering at New York University, affiliated with the NYU Center for Data Science, the Courant Institute of Mathematical Science, the Center for Neural Science, and the Electrical and Computer Engineering Department.
Research Interests
AI, machine learning, computer vision, robotics, image compression
